Which countries have the machines been exported to, and what international certifications are available?

The pipe making machine has been exported to Thailand, Russia, Saudi Arabia, India, Iraq, Algeria, Chile, and other countries and regions. The production lines comply with CE (EU Directives) and are certified under the ISO9001 quality management system.

Are on-site installation and training services available?

On-site installation and commissioning services are provided, together with operation training and basic maintenance guidance conducted by experienced technical engineers. These services ensure smooth production start-up and stable, long-term operation of the irrigation pipe production lines.

title: Drip Irrigation Pipe Making Machines
content:
Why do large-scale farms prefer using the flat dripper drip tape production line?

The flat dripper drip tape production line feature centralized computer control and support high-speed operation of up to 350m/min. Accurate dripper spacing and uniform water discharge are consistently maintained, enabling reliable and precise irrigation performance.Integrated with fully automatic coiling and packaging systems, the production lines are optimized for large-scale, continuous production, providing farms with an efficient, economical, and dependable solution for diverse crop irrigation requirements.

What performance factors do agricultural engineering companies focus on when selecting drip tape production equipment?

When selecting drip tape production equipment, agricultural engineering companies typically prioritize stable high-speed production capability, precise dripper spacing control, a high degree of automation with reduced labor dependence, consistent water discharge performance, strong anti-clogging characteristics, and flexible customization of spacing and tape width. These factors ensure high-quality drip tape output with improved water-use efficiency, stable product consistency, and high qualification rates, enhancing overall irrigation performance and market competitiveness.

What are the differences in using round dripper irrigation pipes between greenhouses and orchards?

Round dripper irrigation pipes are characterized by uniform dripping performance, long laying lengths, and reliable anti-clogging capability under centralized computer control. In greenhouse applications, they are commonly used for high-density crop irrigation, ensuring uniform distribution of water and nutrients. In orchard applications, the focus shifts to adaptability for larger plant spacing and row layouts, with adjustable dripper spacing ranging from 100-1500mm to accommodate the irrigation demands of fruit trees. This flexibility supports efficient water use across different cultivation scenarios.

How can water-scarce regions improve irrigation efficiency through drip irrigation pipe production lines?

High-speed, fully automatic drip irrigation pipe production lines incorporating pressure-compensating dripper structures and precise spacing control technologies enable continuous production of drip pipes and drip tapes with uniform discharge, strong anti-clogging performance, and automatic outlet closure. These features significantly reduce water loss and can increase irrigation water utilization efficiency by more than 30%, making the production lines well suited for large-scale deployment in regions facing water scarcity.

How does the maintenance cycle of drip irrigation tape machine affect continuous farm irrigation?

Drip irrigation tape production machine is designed with integrated automated control systems and maintenance-friendly structures to ensure stable long-term operation and extended maintenance cycles. By minimizing downtime, reducing failure rates, and lowering labor requirements, the equipment supports continuous supply of drip irrigation products and uninterrupted irrigation activities, contributing to higher operational reliability and improved agricultural productivity.

title: Flat Dripper Irrigation Pipe Making Machine
content:
Flat Dripper Irrigation Pipe Making Machine

Polyethylene pipe extrusion line for producing driplines with flat emitters

Video

![Flat Dripper Irrigation Pipe Making Machine](https://filmmachine-en.com/products/flat-dripper-irrigation-pipe-production-line-1-1-2_01.webp)

 Flat dripper irrigation pipe is a widely used water-saving product in drip irrigation systems. Flat emitters with labyrinth flow paths are inlaid inside the plastic pipe at defined intervals, allowing water to flow through micro-channels and be delivered directly to the soil for crop irrigation. Through micro outlets, water is discharged slowly and uniformly near the root zone, ensuring efficient and controlled irrigation. Typically, flat drippers are inlaid into the inner wall of black PE hose, forming an integrated drip tape with reliable performance and long service life.

The production line is equipped with an injection molding unit for flat dripper manufacturing. Dripper length options include 27mm and 33mm, with common configurations ranging from 25-27mm.

Product Applications
 Flat dripper irrigation pipe is suitable for flat terrain and short-distance irrigation scenarios, particularly for seasonal crops. It is widely applied in drip irrigation of agricultural crops such as cotton, as well as fruit, vegetables, trees, and flowers.

title: Layflat Hose Making Machines
content:
Mainline hose and micro-spray hose production lines are designed for the installation of water outlet components developed through proprietary technology. The solutions support both internal installation of outlet components within woven pipes and external installation of outlet components on PE hoses.

Which types of irrigation product manufacturers are suitable for PE woven heat-sealed rain hose production lines?

PE woven heat-sealed rain hose production lines utilize five-layer composite woven fabric structures and are well suited for channel-oriented and large-scale irrigation product manufacturers. These manufacturers typically require mass production of high-strength micro-spray hoses with UV resistance, abrasion resistance, algae resistance, diversified outlet spacing and diameters, and multi-scenario applicability, while maintaining energy-efficient operation. The production lines are particularly suitable for companies focusing on stable performance and differentiated market positioning.

What process parameters should plastic product factories pay attention to when introducing horizontal extrusion water hose lines?

Key process parameters include hose diameter, wall thickness, compatible raw materials, stable extrusion temperature, outlet spacing, production speed, and the precision of vacuum sizing and laser punching processes. Proper control of these parameters ensures final products with reliable abrasion resistance, weather resistance, and high-flow water transmission capability.

What are the differences between micro-spray hose and drip tape in vegetable cultivation?

Micro-spray hose forms water outlets directly on the hose through mechanical or laser punching, creating wide coverage and a fine mist-like spray pattern. It is suitable for uniform surface wetting of vegetables and microclimate regulation.
Drip tape, by contrast, is designed for precise irrigation near the root zone, offering higher water-use efficiency and reduced disease risk through controlled localized watering.

What are the main technical differences between micro-spray hose and standard PE water hose production lines?

Micro-spray hose production lines focus on high-precision laser punching, automated outlet layout, and customized spray coverage control, enabling production of hoses with different outlet counts, spacing, and spray ranges. Standard PE water hose production lines, in comparison, are optimized for high-flow mainline transmission, emphasizing hose forming stability, pressure resistance, and transportation durability.

title: Pre-Punched Layflat Hose Making Machine
content:
Pre-Punched Layflat Hose Making Machine

Designed for producing high-pressure layflat hoses with pre-punched outlet holes

![Pre-Punched Layflat Hose Making Machine](https://filmmachine-en.com/products/pre-punched-outlet-layflat-hose-production-line-1-2-1_01.webp)

 The pre-punched layflat hose making machine is a newly developed water-saving irrigation solution engineered for integrated manufacturing of pre-punched composite layflat hoses. The system is among the earliest in the industry to be developed and commercialized as a complete production line, offering a standardized and scalable solution for irrigation mainline hose manufacturing.

The pre-punched composite layflat hose product is manufactured from PE with a five-layer composite woven structure, to enhance durability, UV resistance, abrasion resistance, and algae resistance. Pre-installed outlet connectors are welded during production, resulting in hoses with high pressure resistance, large diameters, and no need for secondary punching. The hoses are suitable for both high- and low-pressure irrigation environments.

Product Applications
 Pre-punched outlet hole layflat hoses are used as mainline pipelines for drip irrigation and sprinkler irrigation in agricultural fields, including large-scale farmland, orchards, and vegetable or flower cultivation. They are also suitable for landscape irrigation applications such as urban parks and verges.

 The PE woven heat-sealed rain hose production line forms woven fabric into tubular hoses through a heat-sealing process. Micro-spray rain hose (also known as perforated hose or micro-spray irrigation hose) is a micro-sprinkler irrigation product in which water outlets are created directly on the hose body through mechanical or laser punching.

Typically, hoses with three, five, or more outlets per group are laid directly on the ground. Water is sprayed upward through these outlets, forming a fine rain-like spray pattern. The product is suitable for agricultural irrigation, construction sites, orchards, parks, and home gardens, delivering uniform spray performance with explosion resistance, UV resistance, and long service life.

title: Irrigation Pipe Packaging Equipment
content:
Can automatic coiling and strapping equipment adapt to multiple pipe specifications and support fast changeover?

Automatic coiling and strapping equipment integrates the complete workflow of guiding, coiling, tension control, strapping, and output. It is equipped with an industrial-grade PLC and a 10-inch color touchscreen, together with a fully automatic strapping system. The equipment supports a wide specification range and rapid changeover, allowing adaptation to pipe diameters from 20-315mm within approximately 5 minutes without component replacement. This significantly improves production flexibility and equipment utilization.

How does automatic coiling and strapping equipment ensure finished product quality and reduce logistics and storage losses?

The packaging equipment incorporates closed-loop tension control and a multi-layer PET automatic strapping system to ensure tight coiling and flat, well-aligned coil ends. As a result, logistics loss rates can be reduced to below 1%, while long-term storage and transportation are achieved without deformation or damage to the finished products.

How does the equipment perform in terms of durability during high-intensity continuous production and long-term operation?

The packager is built with chrome-plated rollers, imported alloy strapping blades, and German sensors to ensure long-term reliability. The service life of the equipment typically reaches 10-12 years, with annual maintenance costs limited to approximately 1.5-2% of the equipment value, effectively reducing long-term operational risk and total cost of ownership.

What intelligent management and safety features are supported by the automatic coiling and strapping equipment?

The automatic coiling and strapping equipment is equipped with an industrial PLC and a large touchscreen interface, supporting production data storage, data export, remote monitoring, alarm functions, and MES system integration. With IP54 protection across the system and a multi-language user interface, the equipment ensures safe operation, efficient management, and rapid operator onboarding, typically requiring only one hour of training.

title: Packaging Film Blowing Machine
content:
Can packaging film blowing machines efficiently handle multiple materials and product specifications to support fast order changeover across industries?

Packaging film machines support a wide range of materials, including PE, PP, and EVA. Film width can be flexibly configured within 200-2500mm, and film thickness can be adjusted from 0.01-0.2mm. With quick changeover design and fully automatic control systems, the film blowing machine enables efficient production switching for packaging applications across food, daily chemical, and industrial sectors.

What are the core quality and functional advantages of the produced film products?

By incorporating multi-layer co-extrusion technology, closed-loop process control, and a high-precision die head design, the blown film extrusion line delivers significantly enhanced film performance. Compared with conventional blown film equipment, film thickness uniformity is improved by approximately 40%, light transmittance reaches up to 92%, and puncture resistance is increased by about 35%.
In addition, functional layers can be integrated as required, including barrier, anti-static, and antibacterial properties, ensuring stable, high-end packaging quality across a wide range of industry applications.

What are the application differences between multi-layer co-extrusion and single-layer film blowing machines in the packaging industry?

Multi-layer co-extrusion blown film machines enable production of functional films with properties such as oxygen barrier, moisture resistance, puncture resistance, and aroma retention through layered structure combinations. These films are widely used in high-end packaging applications for food, pharmaceutical, and related industries. Single-layer film blowing machines, in contrast, are primarily used for conventional packaging products such as shopping bags, garbage bags, and other basic packaging applications.

title: Agricultural Film Blowing Machine
content:
How can agricultural film producers improve product performance using PO high-transparency anti-fog film blowing machines?

The PO high-transparency anti-fog film blowing machine uses a multi-layer co-extrusion process with micro-pore control and automatic additive dosing. It enables films with high clarity (light transmission ≥92%), long-lasting anti-fog performance, strong heat preservation, and enhanced aging resistance. The films achieve higher tensile strength and flexibility, helping improve crop yield performance and product durability, while meeting the demanding requirements of modern agricultural cultivation.

How should the PO high-transparency anti-fog agricultural film blowing machine be maintained on a daily basis?

Proper daily maintenance helps keep the PO high-transparency anti-fog agricultural film blowing machine running smoothly and extends its service life. We recommend:

- Regular replacement of gearbox gear oil

- Monitoring cooling water flow

- Checking overall machine operation

- Watching for gearbox overheating

- Adjusting belt tension when required

- Listening for abnormal noise or vibration

![High-Transparency Greenhouse Film Blowing Machine (3–5 Layers PO Film)](https://filmmachine-en.com/products/high-transparency-greenhouse-film-blowing-machine-2-2-3_01.webp)

 The plastic film machine is designed for producing high-transparency PO greenhouse films using advanced multi-layer co-extrusion technology. PO films were originally developed in Japan using high-grade polyolefin materials combined with specialized additives, offering excellent uniformity, stability, and film performance. After the technology was introduced to China, the production process evolved to include coating and drying stages, along with precise material ratio control for five-layer structures.

This model is a specialized, high-performance greenhouse film blowing solution focused on PO high-transparency anti-fog greenhouse films. It integrates multi-layer co-extrusion, corona treatment, coating, and drying systems to ensure high-level functional performance. The machine allows precise material formulation using ethylene, propylene, and related blends to achieve outstanding film properties. The resulting films deliver light transmission ≥92%, long-lasting anti-fog performance (over 12 months), strong heat retention (temperature increase of 5–7°C inside the greenhouse), excellent aging resistance (service life 4 to 6 years), and stable weather durability. In addition to greenhouse coverings, the machine can also produce small batches of PO packaging films when required.

title: Irrigation Pipes
content:
Why do large-scale farms prefer using the flat dripper drip tape production line?

The flat dripper drip tape production line feature centralized computer control and support high-speed operation of up to 350m/min. Accurate dripper spacing and uniform water discharge are consistently maintained, enabling reliable and precise irrigation performance.Integrated with fully automatic coiling and packaging systems, the production lines are optimized for large-scale, continuous production, providing farms with an efficient, economical, and dependable solution for diverse crop irrigation requirements.

What performance factors do agricultural engineering companies focus on when selecting drip tape production equipment?

When selecting drip tape production equipment, agricultural engineering companies typically prioritize stable high-speed production capability, precise dripper spacing control, a high degree of automation with reduced labor dependence, consistent water discharge performance, strong anti-clogging characteristics, and flexible customization of spacing and tape width. These factors ensure high-quality drip tape output with improved water-use efficiency, stable product consistency, and high qualification rates, enhancing overall irrigation performance and market competitiveness.

What are the differences in using round dripper irrigation pipes between greenhouses and orchards?

Round dripper irrigation pipes are characterized by uniform dripping performance, long laying lengths, and reliable anti-clogging capability under centralized computer control. In greenhouse applications, they are commonly used for high-density crop irrigation, ensuring uniform distribution of water and nutrients. In orchard applications, the focus shifts to adaptability for larger plant spacing and row layouts, with adjustable dripper spacing ranging from 100-1500mm to accommodate the irrigation demands of fruit trees. This flexibility supports efficient water use across different cultivation scenarios.

How can water-scarce regions improve irrigation efficiency through drip irrigation pipe production lines?

High-speed, fully automatic drip irrigation pipe production lines incorporating pressure-compensating dripper structures and precise spacing control technologies enable continuous production of drip pipes and drip tapes with uniform discharge, strong anti-clogging performance, and automatic outlet closure. These features significantly reduce water loss and can increase irrigation water utilization efficiency by more than 30%, making the production lines well suited for large-scale deployment in regions facing water scarcity.

How does the maintenance cycle of drip irrigation tape machine affect continuous farm irrigation?

Drip irrigation tape production machine is designed with integrated automated control systems and maintenance-friendly structures to ensure stable long-term operation and extended maintenance cycles. By minimizing downtime, reducing failure rates, and lowering labor requirements, the equipment supports continuous supply of drip irrigation products and uninterrupted irrigation activities, contributing to higher operational reliability and improved agricultural productivity.

title: Drip Tape (T-TAPE), with Continuous Strip Dripper
content:
Drip Tape (T-TAPE), with Continuous Strip Dripper

Continuous labyrinth dripline for providing uniform water flow in drip irrigation applications

Drip tape has long been trusted by both large agricultural growers and small farm users for its reliability and efficiency. It offers an economical way to irrigate long, straight crop rows while ensuring even water distribution directly to plant roots. Depending on the application needs, drip tape can be installed on the soil surface, laid beneath mulch, or buried for subsurface irrigation.

![Drip Tape (T-TAPE), with Continuous Strip Dripper](https://filmmachine-en.com/products/continuous-strip-dripper-drip-tape-t-tape-3-1_01.webp)

 Our continuous strip dripper drip tape consists of a PE hose embedded with a continuous labyrinth strip dripper. One side of the strip features comb-shaped and specially structured raised sections designed to support precise flow regulation and stable operation. The strip is bonded to the inner wall of the pipe to form both the main water channel and drip irrigation channel, while the unbonded section creates the inlet and outlet. The outlet is designed with a slit structure similar to a one-way valve. When negative pressure occurs inside the pipe, the outlet automatically closes, helping prevent crop roots or insects from entering and blocking the flow path. The spacing between flow channels can be adjusted through the strip pressing, allowing flexible control of drip spacing.

Between two outlets, a serrated turbulent flow channel design helps maintain stable and uniform water distribution, while all bonding points are molded as an integrated structure for enhanced durability and reliability.

Pre-Punched Layflat Hose

PE woven layflat hose with pre-punched outlet holes

![Pre-Punched Layflat Hose](https://filmmachine-en.com/products/pre-punched-outlet-hole-layflat-hose-3-2_01.webp)

 Pre-punched layflat hoses are widely used in irrigation, water transfer, and construction fluid delivery applications. When not in operation, the hose remains completely flat, making it easier to store, transport, and handle in the field. The pre-punched outlet holes are already integrated along the hose length, allowing quick connection to fittings or branch pipes without additional drilling, helping users save time and improve installation efficiency. It delivers excellent pressure resistance, supports larger flow capacity with its wide diameter design, and provides stable, reliable water delivery across long irrigation runs.

The hose is manufactured using polyethylene composite braided fabric, and adopts a five-layer reinforced braided structure, offering superior durability, UV resistance, abrasion resistance, and algae resistance. This ensures long service life and dependable performance in demanding agricultural environments.

Machinery Solution
 The pre-punched layflat hose eliminates the need for manual drilling and offers strong pressure resistance, making it highly suitable as a main water supply line for large farmland irrigation systems. It performs reliably under both high and low pressure conditions and can be used as the primary pipeline for drip irrigation and sprinkler irrigation setups. It is widely used in orchards, vegetable farms, flower planting bases, as well as urban parks and landscape irrigation projects, providing efficient and convenient water delivery across diverse agricultural and landscaping environments.

title: FAQs
content:
FAQs

What aspects of the plastic pipe/film making machines can be customized?

We can customize component specifications, voltage requirements, branding elements, and other features to match your specific needs.

How can I get a quotation?

Please share your detailed product requirements and your company’s technical background so we can prepare an accurate quotation.

What is the advised payment method and procedure?

Production begins after a 30% deposit is paid. The balance is settled before shipment. Multiple secure payment methods are supported.

How are logistics and packaging arranged?

Logistics options and packaging solutions can be arranged according to your preferences and project requirements.

Do you provide on-site installation and training?

We can provide on-site installation and training services. However, the customers are responsible for the engineer’s labor cost, round-trip travel, accommodation, and ensuring personal and property safety.

What is the warranty and after-sales policy?

Our irrigation pipe and plastic film machines include a one-year warranty with complimentary wear parts. We also provide lifetime after-sales service and support for equipment upgrades.

Can I request free samples?

Free samples are available upon request. You only need to cover shipping costs. Before delivery, we also provide machine testing and inspection services.

Do you accept agents or distributors?

We welcome distributor and agency cooperation. Please contact us for partnership details.
